form.formComment: Having third race start. At debut, 6th of 8 at this track on February 16 over 1106m, 7 len behind Sark with 56kg at $11.40. Second-up ran last in a small field at this track on March 30 over 1006m, 6 len behind Happy Ranch carrying 57kg at $20.80. In with a chance.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of ten weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation seventh of 9 at this track February 4 over 1207m, 11 len behind Ultra Violence carrying 56kg at $2.60. When resuming last campaign second in a small field at Del Mar November 29 over 1207m, 2.75 len behind Dirty Words carrying 55.5kg at $2.60. This is an ideal race to kick off. Top hope.

form.formComment: Last start ran last in a small field at this track on March 23 over 1106m, 15 len behind About Last Night with 57kg at $51.40. form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Only had one start last campaign ran last of 9 at Wyoming Downs on July 27 over 905m, 15 len behind At The Cross carrying 58kg at $17.30. form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of a year and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign fourth in a small field at this track April 23 over 1006m, 3 len behind Son O' Sanpete with 54kg at $1.50. When resuming last campaign second of 8 at Fresno October 4 2024 over 1006m, 3.5 len behind Quintecents carrying 54.5kg at $6.80. Expect a forward showing.

form.formComment: Last start ran last in a small field at this track on March 18 over 1106m, 24 len behind Nitro Boost carrying 55kg at $3.80. Form doesn't read well but he is a genuine chance.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 4th of 9 at this track on March 19 over 1308m, 2 len behind Convey To Me with 57kg at $6.10.
